title: DJ Akademiks spots bigger problem in Clavicular and DaBaby nightclub confrontation caught on video
summary_full: A disagreement between Clavicular and DaBaby during a May 27 performance at Bacara nightclub in Miami went viral online. Clavicular claimed members of DaBaby’s team violated the club’s no-firearm policy, while DaBaby continued performing. DJ Akademiks later reacted on Rumble, warning Clavicular about confronting the rapper and adding more attention to the incident.
